zh.lifeSummary: Ascelin d'Ivry是Roger d'Ivry和Hildeburge Gallardon的兒子，於1065年之前出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾易福-拉-巴塔爾。他於1097年與Isabel Breteuil結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1116年在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Ascelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name   Ancel  . Compare   Asselin   2.

variants.name: Ancel
meanings: Very common Spanish boy's name (pronounced with a hard g and the stress on the second syllable), a vernacular derivative (via Latin) of Greek angelos, which meant ‘messenger’ in classical Greek, but in New Testament Greek acquired the specialized sense ‘messenger of God’, i.e. an angel. It is common in the U.S. In Britain it is now almost exclusively a girl's name, but it was used occasionally as a boy's name from the 1400s, if not earlier. As such it is familiar as the name of Angel Clare , the chief male character in Thomas Hardy's novel Tess of the D'Urbervilles ( 1891 ).

en.lifeSummary: Ascelin d'Ivry was born before 1065, in Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Upper Normandy, France as the son of Roger d'Ivry and Hildeburge Gallardon. He married Isabel Breteuil in 1097. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1116, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Ascelin d'Ivry est né avant 1065, à Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, fils de Roger d'Ivry et Hildeburge Gallardon. Il a épousé Isabel Breteuil en 1097. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1116, dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: Ascelin d'Ivryは1065年以前にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアイvリ-ラ-バティイルでRoger d'IvryとHildeburge Gallardonの息子として生まれた。1097年にIsabel Breteuilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1116年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ascelin d'Ivry(은)는 1065년 이전 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 이브리-라-바테이에서 Roger d'Ivry(와)과 Hildeburge Gallardon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1097년 Isabel Breteuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1116년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ascelin d'Ivry родился перед 1065 г. в местности иври-ла-батеилл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Roger d'Ivry и Hildeburge Gallardon. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Breteuil в 1097 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1116 г. в его родном городе.
